title: Tender Lamb Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew originating from Morocco. This dish is slow-cooked to perfection with tender lamb and flavorful spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb until browned, then set aside.
Char the onion and garlic in the pot for added flavor.
Add the ginger, cumin, and paprika to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lamb broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Return the lamb to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Transfer the pot to the oven and braise for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
